list6.Sinuous: of a serpentine or wavy form : winding
list6.Insolent: rude or impolite : having or showing a lack of respect for other people; often : boldly disrespectful toward those in authority or of higher rank or status
list6.Coy: marked by cute, coquettish, or artful playfulness
list6.Idle: not occupied or employed: such as
list6.Disarray: a lack of order or sequence : confusion, disorder
list6.Scathed: to do harm to; specifically : scorch, sear
list6.Brevity: shortness of duration; especially : shortness or conciseness of expression
